purpose: Define the files that should be pushed to the Gemini-facing Google Drive folder, including which files are source files and which files must be derived first.

required_source_files.label: readme
required_source_files.description: Primary repo overview and operating instructions.

required_source_files.label: tldr_architecture
required_source_files.description: Short architecture summary for quick reading.

required_source_files.label: execution_plan
required_source_files.description: Technical / master project schedule and operating plan.

derived_files.label: overnight_status_json
derived_files.description: Machine-readable overnight status verdict for Gemini.
derived_files.notes: Locally writes both latest.json and dated JSON copies. Drive sync should push the dated file.

derived_files.label: overnight_status_markdown
derived_files.description: Human-readable overnight status summary for Gemini.
derived_files.notes: Locally writes both latest.md and dated Markdown copies. Drive sync should push the dated file.

notes: This config is retained as a reusable template for other repos.
Google Drive push is disabled in this repo; Relay.app handles downstream distribution.
If re-enabled elsewhere, the push script can consume this config directly via --config gemini_feed_config.json.
